targetPositioning: Power Platform / M365 automation practitioner focused on workflow delivery, governance documentation, and production support.
managerHiringProblem: Deliver and support Power Platform workflows for business users with readable documentation and reliable handoff.

top3SellingPoints.title: Power Apps / Power Automate workflow delivery
top3SellingPoints.managerValue: Built and supported Power Platform workflows for legal, HR, and operations processes.

top3SellingPoints.title: SharePoint-backed data and approval processes
top3SellingPoints.managerValue: Used SharePoint-backed lists and workflow logic for approvals, booking, and recruiting sync.

top3SellingPoints.title: Documentation and support readiness
top3SellingPoints.managerValue: Documented API/automation engagement patterns and supported knowledge transfer.

skillsToForeground: Take over and operate production Power Automate flows across HR automation, scheduled syncs, monitoring, and troubleshooting.
Build Power Platform compliance workflow applications that replace spreadsheet-based processes with structured forms, storage, routing, and review controls.
Automate recruiting dispatch by synchronizing Workday candidate and requisition data into SharePoint-backed Power Apps workflows.
Build lifecycle onboarding email automations using learning progress, HR data, fallback logic, and Microsoft Graph email delivery.
Build self-service HR booking workflows with mentor/session selection, SharePoint-backed records, availability controls, and maintainability documentation.
Document Power Platform governance practices covering environment ownership, connection references, licensing, and production transferability.
Maintain production automation credentials and environment variables with documented renewal and publish procedures.
claimsToAvoid: Keep Azure references limited to tools touched inside supported automation contexts.
Evidence does not support independent Azure cloud architecture ownership.
Owned model training or formal machine-learning research
Built production backend systems from scratch
Owned the entire function end to end
cvHeadline: Power Platform Developer | Power Apps, Power Automate, SharePoint Workflow Automation
summaryAngle: Power Platform developer with grounded Power Apps, Power Automate, SharePoint, governance documentation, production troubleshooting, and M365 adoption analytics evidence.
